reasoning: Both models failed to audit the critical PKGBUILD file due to erroneous binary file classification, leaving all build/install logic unexamined.
coverage_issues: PKGBUILD skipped by both models (misclassified as binary)
No review of .install scripts, hooks, or source files referenced by PKGBUILD
false_negatives: All potential risks unexamined: malicious commands in build(), package(), or hooks; unsafe source handling; privilege escalation
learnings: Fix binary file detection: Critical files like PKGBUILD must never be skipped. Implement fallback decoding for misclassified text files.
Improve error handling: Abort audit with clear error when critical files fail to process instead of skipping.
Prioritize core files: Always audit PKGBUILD first before proceeding to other files.
